message: Jake
Gordon
Miles
Well, well, what brings you here?
You again.

about Tony

Exit the game
From here, I can't see how the customers inside are doing. I'm curious about what kind of faces the important folks are making while drinking.
A girl in a boldly cut dress is standing there. The light reflects off her blonde hair, and she's quite beautiful.
It seems like she's definitely not planning to let me in. Soon, she'll probably call a scary guy.
He hasn't broken his gentlemanly attitude.
He is a patient man.
I wonder when he'll show his true colors?
A pricey suit and tie suitable for the owner of a high-end club, well-groomed beard and hair.
The more I see him, the more I dislike him.
His calm demeanor and how he handles people shows that he's definitely not an ordinary man.
What exactly do you intend?
What do you mean by 'what do you intend'?
I'm saying it would be troubling if you entered without a purpose.
Let me be clear, you are not the type of person permitted entry into this place.
What the hell are you trying to say? It seems like you're hiding something you want to say, huh?
I just want to hear about your relationship with Tonny.
So?
Is it true that Tonny was made to participate in a snuff video and forced to do various things with it?
I've never heard such a thing.
As a made-up story, it's decent, I guess.
I have nothing to talk about.
I'd like to ask about Mr. Tonny Ford.
There has been a similar situation before. I have nothing else to discuss.
But,
I asked because I heard something strange from him that piqued my interest.
I don't know what he's saying, but he’s just one of the customers. That's all there is to it.
I’m quite busy, you know.
Why did you set Tonny up?
You're just a clueless guy, huh? I told you there’s no such fact.
That's a lie. You must have some reason for it,
or are you just doing it for profit?
I’d prefer if you never came back to this shop again. If you don’t leave right away, I’ll call the police.
Get lost while my patience lasts. I won’t be responsible if you can’t get home by yourself.
Well, he went somewhere. What he does and where he is has nothing to do with me.
You’re surprisingly cold, huh?
Yeah, if it’s about Tonny Ford, it’s better to ask him. He should know more about it than I do.
Do you think I don’t know,
what you were commanding?
What do you think I was commanding?
What he does in his personal life is none of my business.
Alright, let’s ask him directly.
It would be wise to do so, though I don't know what you're asking?
Now, where did he go?
It’s probably impossible to get the truth out of him. I'm just not the right person for the role.
Playing the gentleman while anything goes behind the scenes, huh?
He’s safe, untouchable by anyone.
He’s not someone I can deal with. The police probably can't arrest him either.
If Tonny was set up,
the scalpel might have been used at that time.
So what Tonny said was true after all.
What benefit did he gain from setting up Tonny?
The truth is, Tonny was a victim too. I don't feel any sympathy, but the one who is really to blame is
the one who had it coming.
He stepped into a world he shouldn't have entered. You could say it’s karma.
